admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Super admin panel — manage users, organizations, and system health.

users.title: Users
users.description: Browse, search, and impersonate any user across all organizations.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: All workspaces in the system, ranked by recency.

impersonate.confirm: Impersonate {label}? You will see the app as this user until you stop.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick steps and you're ready to ship.

plan.title: Pick a plan
plan.description: Start free or unlock more capacity. You can change plans any time.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: We will send a verification link to confirm a new email address.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a square image (PNG, JPEG, or WebP, max 2MB).
avatar.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
avatar.invalidType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.

impact.hero_subtitle: Let there be no difficult business in the world.
impact.social_description: Empowering edge innovators. Breaking traditional filters and empowering solo founders with out-of-the-box infrastructure.
impact.governance_description: Algorithmic governance built on Proof of Work and real business results, replacing opaque bureaucracy.
impact.environment_description: Driving cloud footprint reduction via extreme SaaS integration and resource efficiency.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your password, multi-factor authentication, and active sessions.
security.managedByProvider: Security settings are managed by your authentication provider.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Use a strong password you don't reuse on other sites.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second verification step using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code below.
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeAll: Sign out of all other devices

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Review OAuth sign-in methods linked to your Nebutra identity.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use device-bound credentials for phishing-resistant sign-in.

setPassword.title: Set a password
setPassword.description: Add a password to sign in without your OAuth provider.
setPassword.sentMessage: We've sent a password setup link to your email.

magicLink.title: Sign in with a magic link
magicLink.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to sign in.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with mixed case and numbers.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.samePassword: New password must be different from your current password.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address first.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidVerificationCode: Verification code is incorrect or expired.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimited: You're doing that too often. Slow down.
errors.providerNotSupported: This action is managed by your authentication provider.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

suggestions.title: Try one of these to get started

activity.title: Show recent activity
activity.prompt: Show me the most recent activity across my workspace from the past 24 hours.

debug.title: Debug an error
debug.prompt: Help me debug a runtime error. I will paste the stack trace and you can guide me through it.

email.title: Draft a summary email
email.prompt: Draft a concise weekly summary email I can send to my team about platform progress.

features.title: Explore platform features
features.prompt: Walk me through the key features of this SaaS platform and how I can use them.

activePlan.title: Active plan
activePlan.noPlanDescription: Pick a plan to unlock paid features and higher usage limits.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your billing status.

logo.title: Organization logo
logo.description: Upload a square image (PNG, JPEG, or WebP, max 2MB) to represent your organization.
logo.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.
logo.invalidType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.

name.title: Organization name
name.description: Update the display name shown to your team and customers.
name.label: Name

delete.title: Delete organization
delete.description: Permanently remove this organization, all members, invitations, and associated data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the organization name to confirm

invitation.title: You've been invited
invitation.heading: You've been invited to join {organizationName}
invitation.description: Accept the invitation to start collaborating with the team.
invitation.errorEmailMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email
invitation.errorEmailMismatchDetail: Sign in with the email address that received the invitation to accept it.
invitation.errorExpiredDetail: Ask the inviter to send a new invitation.
invitation.errorNotFoundDetail: The invitation link is invalid or has been revoked.
invitation.errorNotAvailableDetail: This invitation has already been responded to and is no longer active.
